name: Truncation of Security-relevant Information
description: The product truncates the display, recording, or processing of security-relevant information in a way that can obscure the source or nature of an attack. When log entries or security data are cut short, the attack source becomes difficult or impossible to determine.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS or CONTROL nodes (security events, log data) flowing through a TRANSFORM node (truncation, length limit) before reaching a STORAGE node (log file, audit record) without a CONTROL node (completeness check) ensuring critical fields are preserved. The truncation removes attack-relevant details.
